name: Sotto Sotto
subtitle: Italian Restaurant
tagline: Authentic Italian cooking in the heart of Bath. Handmade pasta, slow-simmered ragu, and classic tiramisu — served just below street level since 2002.
registeredAddress: 10 N Parade, Bath BA2 4AL, United Kingdom
pageTitle: Sotto Sotto — Italian Restaurant in Bath
menuIntroText: Hand-rolled pasta, slow-braised sauces, and desserts made fresh each morning — a taste of Italy, tucked just beneath the streets of Bath.

items.name: Linguine con gamberi
items.desc: Linguine tossed with prawns, sun-dried tomatoes, anchovies, black olives, capers, garlic and EVO oil

items.name: Fettuccine al ragù d'agnello
items.desc: Fresh homemade fettuccine with lamb ragout on a bed of Pecorino cheese fondue

items.name: Fettuccine alla crema di zucca
items.desc: Fresh homemade fettuccine, sage, chilli, roasted butternut squash, pancetta and truffle cream

items.name: Risotto al Barbera
items.desc: Italian Arborio risotto with Barbera wine, sausage and cream of Taleggio cheese

items.name: Carré di agnello in crosta di pistacchi
items.desc: Pistachio crusted rack of lamb with mixed roasted root vegetables and Primitivo red wine sauce

items.name: Tiramisu della Casa
items.desc: Espresso-soaked savoiardi, mascarpone, and cocoa — made fresh every morning

items.name: Panna Cotta
items.desc: Vanilla bean panna cotta with raspberry coulis and fresh mint

screenshotsIntro: Tucked beneath the streets of Bath — candlelight, stone arches, and the hum of a full dining room. (Example images from Openverse; your real photos will replace these.)

screenshots.sub: Natural light over an Italian lunch

screenshots.title: A Table for Two

reservationNote: We recommend booking at least 7 days in advance. Friday and Saturday tables fill quickly.
footerNote: Proudly independent. Italian ingredients. Bath soul.
aboutParagraphs: Sotto Sotto has been a Bath institution for over two decades. Tucked beneath the arches of North Parade, our candlelit dining room feels a world away from the city above.

We cook the dishes our families grew up with — slow-braised ragus, hand-rolled pasta, and desserts that arrive at the table with the quiet confidence of recipes that have travelled through generations.
Every ingredient is chosen for flavour, not fuss. The result is honest Italian food in a room that makes you want to stay all evening.

whyChooseItems.text: Slow-cooked sauces and fresh pasta made daily in our kitchen
Over 1,200 Google reviews with a consistent 4.6-star rating
5★ Food Hygiene rating and AA Rosette recognition
Independent Bath favourite — no chains, no shortcuts

reviews.name: Emily Richardson
reviews.text: The lamb ragu is the best I've had outside Italy. Intimate, candlelit, and completely unforgettable.

reviews.name: James & Olivia
reviews.text: We celebrated our anniversary here and the team made it feel truly special. Tiramisu is mandatory.

reviews.name: Luca B.
reviews.text: As an Italian living in Bath, this is the only place that reminds me of home. Authentic, warm, and delicious.

story.title: Beneath the Streets of Bath
paragraphs: Sotto Sotto has been a Bath institution for over two decades. Tucked beneath the arches of North Parade, our candlelit dining room feels a world away from the city above.

We cook the dishes our families grew up with — slow-braised ragus, hand-rolled pasta, and desserts that arrive at the table with the quiet confidence of recipes that have travelled through generations.
Every ingredient is chosen for flavour, not fuss. The result is honest Italian food in a room that makes you want to stay all evening.
